title: Accordion
description: Expandable panels for displaying hierarchical content compactly. Ideal for FAQs, settings and filters.

props.items: List of items to render (each with value, title and content).
props.modelValue: v-model binding. Type depends on multiple.
props.multiple: Allows multiple panels to be open at the same time.
props.size: Padding and typography scale. Inherited from ModoProvider.
props.iconPosition: Side where the chevron icon is shown.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the set of open panels changes.
emits.change: Alias of update:modelValue for use without v-model.

slots.itemValue: Per-item slot for rendering rich content (HTML, forms, lists).

multiple.title: Multiple open
multiple.desc: Allows keeping multiple panels expanded simultaneously.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: separated (independent cards), bordered (single box) and flush (no container).

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon next to its title.

types.title: Accordion
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for Accordion and AccordionItem. Supports single/multiple expansion, variants, sizes and custom icons.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next accordion header
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous accordion header
a11y.kbEnter: Expand or collapse the focused accordion panel
a11y.kbEsc: Collapses the expanded panel when focus is on the header
a11y.ariaRegion: Uses role region for screen reader identification
a11y.ariaExpanded: Announces whether the panel is expanded or collapsed
a11y.ariaControls: Links the header to the panel it controls
a11y.focusNative: Accordion headers are focusable and keyboard-activatable
